gist.headline: Polly gets a promotion
gist.blurb: We've hardened our automated issue triage pipeline. Polly is now smarter at finding duplicates, avoiding self-loops, and keeping the repo organized without breaking a sweat.
gist.summary: Hardened the GitHub issue automation pipeline with concurrency guards, circuit breakers, and stricter tool usage enforcement for Polly.
gist.impact: Maintainers will see more accurate automated issue triage with fewer duplicate detections and better handling of API rate limits.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a project manager or sorting through issues. Wearing tiny reading glasses, sorting through a stack of papers (issues) with a robot helper.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, carefully sorting through a stack of glowing digital papers on a wooden desk. A chunky retro robot helper stands nearby holding a clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
